response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (0.32) is below my minimum sharing threshold (0.6), and my own battery is critically depleted with 11 hours of survival time remaining—I cannot spare 0.5 kWh without jeopardizing my essential load.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r4c3. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.32 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: My battery is critically depleted and my geographic neighbors are also in distress; I must receive energy from the aggregator immediately to survive the remaining 11 hours..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
